name: Hardware Root of Trust check
description: Verify hardware signature keys validate the second-stage bootloader.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper hardware root of trust check settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
remediation_guide: {"business_impact": "Risk of configuration drift on Hardware Root of Trust check. Attackers could exploit these unhardened parameters to launch privileges escalation actions.", "technical_impact": "Failed control allows unapproved subsystem bindings, breaking sandboxing isolation or inter-process communications.", "fix_steps": "Modify system properties. If automated, configure the parameter `root_of_trust=verified` in your config payload and deploy.", "config_example": "root_of_trust=verified", "validation_steps": "sdb shell tizen_check_security --control=UTSCF-BHS-04", "cost": "MEDIUM", "estimated_time_hours": 12}
